title: Custom Splash Screen (Multiplatform Fork)
description: Change minecraft's loading screen to your liking! Completely configurable!
body:
Allows you to completely change the minecraft splash screen.

Provides many config options so you can customize the loading screen to your liking.

Requires [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config).

Examples: [Go to the original post](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-splash-screen)

This fork adds Forge port support. (Minecraft 1.18+)

**For Forge users: After dragging the mod file into your mods directory, double-click **(Windows)**, extract **(Any)** or type `java -jar CustomSplashScreenF2F-installer-1.2.1-t7.jar` in your command line **(Any)**. Otherwise this mod won't be loaded!**
